---
title: "Create a vendor"
description: "Create a new bill pay vendor."
api: "POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/vendors"
---

**Required scope:** `vendors:write`

<Note>
  Vendors created via the API are approved by default and are not subject to existing approval policies.
</Note>

## Body

<ParamField body="business_vendor_contacts" type="object" required>
  Primary contact information.
  <Expandable title="Contact">
    <ParamField body="email" type="string" required>Contact email address.</ParamField>
    <ParamField body="first_name" type="string">Contact first name.</ParamField>
    <ParamField body="last_name" type="string">Contact last name.</ParamField>
    <ParamField body="phone" type="string">Contact phone number.</ParamField>
  </Expandable>
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="country" type="string" required>
  Vendor country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="name" type="string">
  Vendor display name.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="address" type="object">
  Vendor address (address_line_1, city, state, postal_code, country).
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="external_vendor_id" type="string">
  External vendor identifier from your system.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="accounting_vendor_remote_id" type="string">
  Accounting vendor ERP ID to link this vendor to.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="vendor_owner_id" type="string">
  UUID of the Ramp user who will own this vendor.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="state" type="string">
  Vendor US state code.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="request_payment_details" type="boolean">
  Whether to send an email requesting bank account details from the vendor.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="request_tax_details" type="boolean">
  Whether to send an email requesting tax information from the vendor.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="vendor_tracking_category_option_id" type="string">
  Spend category option ID to associate with this vendor.
</ParamField>

## Response

Returns the created vendor object. See [List vendors](/api-reference/vendors/list) for the full response schema.
